title: Overlay cleanups after #666
body:
Following up on https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/666#pullrequestreview-4158235382 .

Marked as draft:
- This should pass a Podman test suite
- To allow early review. Cc: @giuseppe

comments.body: (The rebase moves `getLowerLayerIDs` earlier, so that a later commit does not move it again.)
Tests in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28571 all passed (after some retries), marking as ready for review.
